home.title: Miauu – Cat Care in St. Gallen
home.description: Loving cat care in St. Gallen: grooming & wellness, cat sitting with home visits, smart monitored cat homes and health test kits for your cat.

services.title: Services – Miauu St. Gallen
services.description: Our services: grooming & wellness, cat sitting & home visits, smart Miauu Homes with camera monitoring, and preventive health care with test kits.

pricing.title: Pricing – Miauu St. Gallen
pricing.description: Transparent pricing for cat grooming, cat sitting, smart cat homes and health test kits in St. Gallen.

about.title: About us – Miauu St. Gallen
about.description: Meet Miauu: your team for modern, loving cat care in St. Gallen.

contact.title: Contact – Miauu St. Gallen
contact.description: Get in touch with Miauu in St. Gallen – we reply within 24 hours.

hero.title: So your cat feels completely at home.
hero.subtitle: Grooming, sitting, smart cat homes and preventive health care – all from one team, with a lot of heart.

window.title: Every cat has a world of its own.
window.text: We take the time to understand it – at your home or with us in St. Gallen.

care.title: Cared for from ears to tail tip.
care.text: Gentle brushing, claw care and wellness – stress-free and with plenty of patience.

play.title: Play, food and company – even while you're away.
play.text: Our cat sitters visit your cat at home: feeding, playing, cuddling.

rest.title: Sleep safely. Stay healthy.
rest.text: Smart cat homes with monitoring and test kits for prevention – peace for your cat, peace of mind for you.

services.title: All-round care for your cat.
services.intro: From coat care to preventive health checks: Miauu combines loving care with modern technology – right in St. Gallen.

grooming.title: Grooming & Wellness
grooming.teaser: Gentle grooming for a shiny coat and a relaxed cat.
grooming.description: Our grooming follows your cat's pace: short breaks, calm hands, no assembly-line work. From dematting to claw care – your cat leaves us more relaxed than it arrived.

sitting.title: Cat Sitting & Home Visits
sitting.teaser: Reliable visits at your home – food, play and affection.
sitting.description: Cats prefer to stay in their familiar surroundings. Our sitters come to your home: feeding, fresh water, litter box, play time – and a daily photo update if you like.

smartHome.title: Smart Miauu Homes
smartHome.teaser: A safe home for your cat – with camera and monitoring.
smartHome.description: Our Miauu Homes are high-quality cat houses with built-in monitoring: camera, temperature and activity sensors. Check on your cat from your phone at any time – ideal for balconies, gardens or as a retreat inside your flat.

health.title: Health & Test Kits
health.teaser: Prevention made easy – with test kits for home use.
health.description: Detect early instead of treating late: our test kits check kidney and urinary values, among others, comfortably at home. If anything looks off, we advise you personally and can refer you to veterinarians in the region.
features: Test kits for kidney & urinary values
Referral to vets in St. Gallen

local.title: Local in St. Gallen
local.text: Short distances, personal care and a team that knows your cat by name.

gentle.title: Stress-free grooming
gentle.text: We work at your cat's pace – no force, no rush.

tech.title: Modern technology
tech.text: Monitoring and test kits give you peace of mind when you're not around.

ctaBand.title: Ready for relaxed cat days?
ctaBand.text: Tell us about your cat – we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

pricing.title: Transparent and fair.
pricing.intro: All prices in CHF incl. VAT. Happy to prepare a personal quote for individual needs.
pricing.note: Prices are guide values – we'll agree the final price together with you.

about.title: Out of love for cats.
about.story1: Miauu was born in St. Gallen – out of the conviction that cat care can be more than a chore appointment. We combine loving, patient care with modern technology so that cats and their humans are both well.
about.story2: Whether grooming, sitting, a smart Miauu Home or a health test kit: your cat's wellbeing always comes first. We take time, listen, and find the best solution together with you.

items.title: Patience
items.text: Every cat sets its own pace – we adapt.

items.title: Trust
items.text: Transparency in everything we do. From pricing to photo updates.

items.title: Closeness
items.text: Rooted in St. Gallen, personally reachable, no waiting loops.

region.title: Our service area
region.text: We care for cats in the city of St. Gallen and surroundings – including Gossau, Herisau, Wittenbach, Gaiserwald and Speicher. Your town not listed? Just ask us.

contact.title: Tell us about your cat.
contact.intro: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours. Or write to us directly at hallo@miauu.ch.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
This website only collects personal data that you voluntarily provide via the contact form (name, email address, message). We use this data exclusively to process your inquiry and do not pass it on to third parties.

Responsible entity: Miauu Cat Care, Musterstrasse 1, 9000 St. Gallen, hallo@miauu.ch.

You have the right to access, correct or delete your data at any time. Please contact the address above.

[Have this text legally reviewed before going live.]
